hardcoretotemnerf.midnightconfig.title: Hardcore Totem Nerf Config
hardcoretotemnerf.midnightconfig.useCool: Enforce a cooldown on totem usage
hardcoretotemnerf.midnightconfig.usageCo: The number of seconds (per player) that must pass between totem usages
hardcoretotemnerf.midnightconfig.useUsag: Limit the total number of times a player may use a totem
hardcoretotemnerf.midnightconfig.usageLi: The total number of times a player may use a totem.
hardcoretotemnerf.midnightconfig.enableW: Inform players about remaining limits (and cooldown) when they pop a totem
hardcoretotemnerf.midnightconfig.allowPl: Allow players to query limit information via command
hardcoretotemnerf.midnightconfig.usageRe: Reduce a player's max health whenever they use a totem
hardcoretotemnerf.midnightconfig.maxHeal: The amount to reduce the player's max health when they use a totem
hardcoretotemnerf.midnightconfig.minimum: The absolute minimum value this mod will reduce a player's max health to. If set to 0, using too many totems can kill the player.
hardcoretotemnerf.midnightconfig.notchAp: Increase a player's max health when they consume an enchanted golden apple
hardcoretotemnerf.midnightconfig.maxHeal: The amount to increase the player's max health when they consume a notch apple
hardcoretotemnerf.midnightconfig.maximum: The absolute maximum value this mod will increase a player's max health to.
hardcoretotemnerf.midnightconfig.disable: Disable the totem's fire resistance effect
hardcoretotemnerf.midnightconfig.enableB: Apply the blindness effect when a totem is used
hardcoretotemnerf.midnightconfig.blindne: The number of ticks to apply the effect. (20 ticks = 1 second)
The potency of the effect. In vanilla minecraft, this is limited to 1, but higher values are allowed in case another mod supports it.
hardcoretotemnerf.midnightconfig.enableS: Apply the slowness effect when a totem is used
hardcoretotemnerf.midnightconfig.slownes: The number of ticks to apply the effect. (20 ticks = 1 second)
The potency of the effect. Anything higher than 6 renders the player immobile without ender pearls.
hardcoretotemnerf.midnightconfig.enableW: Apply the weakness effect when a totem is used
hardcoretotemnerf.midnightconfig.weaknes: The number of ticks to apply the effect. (20 ticks = 1 second)
The potency of the effect. High enough levels will render a player incapable of dealing damage.
hardcoretotemnerf.midnightconfig.enableM: Apply the mining fatigue effect when a totem is used
hardcoretotemnerf.midnightconfig.weaknes: The number of ticks to apply the effect. (20 ticks = 1 second)
hardcoretotemnerf.midnightconfig.miningF: The potency of the affect. In vanilla, there is no additional impact after level 4, but higher values are allowed in case another mod supports it.
hardcoretotemnerf.midnightconfig.minInst: The minimum value this mod will instantly set the player's health to after using a totem.
hardcoretotemnerf.midnightconfig.maxInst: The maximum value this mod will instantly set the player's health to after using a totem.
hardcoretotemnerf.midnightconfig.instant: A divider to be applied to the instant healing value applied by using a totem. Setting this to one simulates vanilla behavior.
